name: Cat Agents Stability
description: Companion governance plugin for trading-agents-workflow. Exposes stability status, desired-state drift, findings, lanes, runbook, and guarded repair/doctor actions while keeping workflow state changes behind explicit workflow APIs.

stabilityBin.description: Path to the cat-agents-stability CLI. Defaults to ./bin/cat-agents-stability.

allowMutatingActions.description: Allow doctor/repair to perform low-risk mutations when explicitly requested. Default false.

toolTimeoutMs.description: Tool execution timeout in milliseconds. Default 30000.

toolAccess.description: Per-agent OpenClaw tool exposure. Full agents receive cat_agents_stability plus stability_profile_probe; all other agents receive only stability_profile_probe unless disabled.
